title: nxr execution plan
description: FROZEN (V2.0): machine-readable execution-plan envelope (schema version 1). Additive optional fields may appear in minor releases; breaking changes require a new major schema_version.

root.description: Primary root task id (first requested root).

roots.description: All requested roots when the plan is a multi-root union.

failure_policy.description: Scheduler reaction when a node fails.

nodes.description: Reachable subgraph nodes in lexicographic id order.

serial_order.description: Deterministic serial execution order (dependencies before dependents).

waves.description: Optional parallel-ready waves; serial plans use one task id per wave.

interactive.description: When true, the scheduler runs this node exclusively (stdin/terminal inherited; no concurrent peers).
